rationale: Educ. Code §45.302 governs charter school facilities credit enhancement programs and is unrelated to residence homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The commissioner by rule may establish an open-enrollment charter school facilities credit enhancement program to assist charter holders in obtaining financing for the purchase, repair, or renovation of real property
_note: No conflict; rule addresses charter school facility financing, not homestead exemptions.
